content: The Self-Refine framework for iterative code improvement can be augmented by integrating multiple inconsistent solving perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanisms, creating a multi-perspective self-refinement pipeline that retains Self-Refine’s key advantage of requiring no additional supervised training or external data. This combined system addresses the critical limitation of single-perspective self-feedback in standard Self-Refine, where blind spots in the LLM’s initial output can never be caught because the model cannot critique what it cannot see.
